violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Replace two cutting boards on the cold tables.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food - burger, cooked protiens - was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Temped between 47F - 50F. Product moved to other fridges. Monitor temperature.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Metal spoon found in Tuna container being held in prep cooler. No utensils should be stored in items containing potentially hazard foods.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Cutting boards at the preparation stations are in need of replacement. Very visible damage and discoloration.--Hot sauces are being stored in a cardboard box near microwave. All containers holding food items must be in a smooth, easily cleanable container.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Charbroiler and flat-top griddle in need of cleaning. Lots of grease buildup on the sides.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Metal containers underneath the microwave are not properly inverted to prevent contamination.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Ceiling is in need of cleaning. Visible buildup over a majority of the cooking and prep areas. Floor tiling in need of some cleaning, some tiles cracked and damaged.
Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light bulb over soda fountain.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
